mapper.select: select a.id, a.merchant_name, a.charge_person_name, a.charge_person_phone, a.logo, a.credit_code, a.province_code, a.city_code, a.country_code, a.address, a.staff_count, a.merchant_score, a.state, concat(c1.city_name, c2.city_name, c3.city_name, a.address) as fullAddress from cm_merchant_info a left join city_code c1 on a.province_code = c1.city_id left join city_code c2 on a.city_code = c2.city_id left join city_code c3 on a.country_code = c3.city_id where a.id = #{id}
mapper.update: update cm_merchant_info set state = #{state} where id = #{id}

update cm_merchant_info set deleted = '1' where id in
#{id}
mapper.select:
select merchant_name from cm_merchant_info where id in
#{id}
select a.id as merchantId, a.merchant_name as merchantName from cm_merchant_info a where a.deleted = '0' and a.state = '1'
